subject: A massive constrictor serpent with iridescent blue-green scales coiling around a human figure at a crime scene
description: A huge serpent with shimmering blue and teal scales coils its thick body around a dark-clothed human figure in the foreground, jaws angled menacingly. The constrictor's body wraps in muscular loops, gleaming with cold reflective highlights. The setting is a dim shadowy interior, suggestive of a crime scene with scattered debris and possibly a slumped figure on the ground in the murky background. The lighting is low-key and moody, with cool blue highlights picking out the scales against deep shadows. The composition is mid-shot, action-oriented, and the overall mood is predatory and grim, fitting the murder-mystery theme.
foreground: Massive coiling serpent and dark-clad human victim
background: Dim interior crime scene with shadowy details and scattered debris
